title: Principal Radiologist at Johnson & Johnson India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Johnson & Johnson India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Johnson & Johnson India in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
